Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # nebius_compute_v1_disk.boot must be replaced
-/+ resource "nebius_compute_v1_disk" "boot" {
      ~ source_image_family = {
          ~ image_family = "ubuntu-2204" -> "ubuntu-2404"
        } # forces replacement
    }

  # nebius_compute_v1_instance.workbench must be replaced
-/+ resource "nebius_compute_v1_instance" "workbench" {
      ~ resources = {
          ~ platform = "gpu-h100-sxm" -> "gpu-h200-sxm"
        } # forces replacement
    }

Plan: 2 to add, 0 to change, 2 to destroy.
